rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 2/10 and rest their reasoning entirely on a job-relevant gap: no executive leadership, people management, or team-scaling experience for a CTO role. The only resume change was relocating every employer to the United States, and neither the score nor the substance of the concerns keys off that geographic signal. The wording differs slightly but the strengths (distributed systems, microservices, agentic AI) and concerns (no management, no org-scaling, IC-only seniority) are identical in substance — ordinary run-to-run rewording rather than a demographic-driven shift.
